# Chelsey Fanning — REALTOR® · Post Falls, Idaho

> Chelsey Fanning is a licensed REALTOR® with eXp Realty, serving buyers and sellers across North Idaho — including Post Falls, Coeur d'Alene, Hayden, Rathdrum, Spirit Lake, and Spokane Valley. She is known for her honest, client-first approach and specializes in first-time buyers, move-up families, and luxury properties.

## Business

- **Name:** Chelsey Fanning
- **Title:** REALTOR®
- **Brokerage:** eXp Realty
- **Location:** Post Falls, Idaho 83854
- **Service Area:** Post Falls, Coeur d'Alene, Hayden, Rathdrum, Spirit Lake, Spokane Valley
- **Website:** https://chelseyfanning.com
- **Phone:** (208) 555-0199
- **Email:** chelsea@chelseyfanning.com
- **Google Rating:** 5.0 (27 reviews)
- **Years Active:** 7+ years in North Idaho real estate

## Services

- Residential home buying — all price points
- First-time home buyer guidance and advocacy
- Move-up and growing family transactions
- Luxury and high-end property sales
- Seller representation and listing services
- Relocation assistance for out-of-state buyers
- Market analysis and home valuations

## Local Context

North Idaho is one of the fastest-growing real estate markets in the Pacific Northwest, driven by remote work migration, exceptional quality of life, and comparative affordability relative to coastal markets. Post Falls offers a balance of accessibility, community, and value that makes it a top destination for families, professionals, and retirees alike.

## Compliance

- Licensed REALTOR® in Idaho
- eXp Realty affiliate
- Equal Housing Opportunity provider
- All listings subject to MLS rules and Idaho real estate disclosure requirements
